text:
is an artbook by various illustrators of khara inc. published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 20 March 2018.

Overview

The collection of illustrations made between 2007 and 2017 for the Evangelion franchise. For each of them, a short legend presents their origins as well as their illustrators (庵野秀明, 貞本義行, 鶴巻和哉, 林明美, 平松禎史, 本田雄, 松原秀典, 田真宏, 摩砂雪, 増尾昭一, 山下いくと, ほか多数) https://www.eva-info.jp/3636 . The types of illustrations are very diverse: posters, marketing campaigns, pachinko, advertising, magazine illustrations, etc. The period highlighted by the book corresponds to that of the release of the first three films of the Rebuild of Evangelion series and the first ten years of the studio Khara inc. https://www.eva-info.jp/3784 .

Table of Contents

Trivia

A tribute to Shoichi Masuo, who died in July 2017, is present on the back of the book jacket.
